# ERA Print Pack — llms.txt

ERA Print Pack (NPT Shtypshkronja ERA) is a paper packaging manufacturer based in Pristina, Kosovo.
We produce custom-printed paper cups, food boxes, labels, and packaging for cafes, restaurants, and food businesses across Kosovo and the region.

## Key pages

- / — Homepage: company overview, products, process, client stats
- /products — Full product catalog overview
- /products/gota — Paper cups (3.5oz espresso, 7oz coffee, 12oz cappuccino) with 3D live configurator
- /products/mbajtese — Cutlery holders (Mbajtëse) with 3D live configurator and AR preview
- /products/akullore — Ice cream cups (Kupa akullore) S and M sizes with 3D live configurator and AR preview
- /machines — Our 13 production machines
- /about — Company story, values, client sectors, regional presence
- /contact — Order request form, WhatsApp, FAQ

## Products

- Paper cups (Gota letre): 3.5oz, 7oz, 12oz — custom printed with client logo or full design
- Pasta and soup cups (Kupa): S, M, L sizes
- Ice cream cups (Kupa akullore): H53, H63 sizes
- Food boxes (Kuti ushqimore): burger boxes, fries boxes, salad boxes, cake boxes, Dubai gold foil gift boxes
- Cutlery holders (Mbajtese): spoon holders, 2-slot coffee holders, universal coffee holders
- Custom labels and stickers (Etiketa): self-adhesive, for food, beverages, olive oil
- Table paper (Leter tavoline): disposable rolls for restaurants
- Wrapping paper (Leter mbeshtjellese)
- Cardboard packaging (Kartona)
- Paper plates (Pjata)
- Cup lids (Kapak gota)

## Key facts

- Company: NPT Shtypshkronja ERA (also known as ERA Print Pack)
- Founded: Pristina region, Kosovo — 15+ years in operation
- Active clients: 397+
- Production machines: 13
- Units produced: 3.9 million+
- Minimum order: from 500 pieces (varies by product type)
- Production time: 7–14 business days
- Delivery: Kosovo-wide; international on request
- Languages: Albanian (primary), English

## What makes ERA different

- Free 3D mockup with every order — clients preview their logo on the actual product before printing
- **Augmented Reality preview** — clients can point their phone camera at their table and see the actual cup or product at true real-world size with their own design on it, before placing an order
- Custom design service — ERA positions and sizes the logo automatically
- Family-owned manufacturer — direct contact with production, no middlemen
- 13 production machines in-house — full control over quality and timelines

## Contact

- Phone / WhatsApp: +383 44 113 533
- Website: https://era-printpack.com
- Location: Pristina, Kosovo
